description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: maritime land force service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: theater of World War II fought in the Pacific and Asia
description_wiki: The Pacific War, sometimes called the Asia–Pacific War or the Pacific Theater, was the theater of World War II fought between Japan and the Allies in East and Southeast Asia, the Pacific and Indian Oceans, and Oceania.

description: 1945 major battle in which US Forces captured the island of Iwo Jima from Japan during World War II
description_wiki: The Battle of Iwo Jima (硫黄島の戦い, Iōtō no Tatakai, Iōjima no Tatakai; 19 February – 26 March 1945) was a major battle in which the United States Marine Corps (USMC) and United States Navy (USN) landed on and eventually captured the island of Iwo Jima from the Imperial Japanese Army (IJA) during World War II. The American invasion, designated Operation Detachment, had the goal of capturing the island with its two airfields: South Field and Central Field.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: city in and county seat of Milwaukee County, and largest city in State of Wisconsin, United States
description_wiki: Milwaukee is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Wisconsin.

description: international humanitarian movement
description_wiki: The International Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement is a humanitarian movement with approximately 16 million volunteers, members, and staff worldwide.

description: battle in the Pacific Theater of World War II, at the Tarawa Atoll in the Gilbert Islands
description_wiki: The Battle of Tarawa was fought on 20–23 November 1943 between the United States and Japan on Tarawa Atoll in the Gilbert Islands, and was part of Operation Galvanic, the U.S. invasion of the Gilberts.

description: American activist (1945-2007)
description_wiki: William H. Compton, Jr.

description: geographic region of the U.S.
description_wiki: The Dakotas, also known as simply Dakota, is a collective term for the U.S. states of North Dakota and South Dakota.

description: 1937 mass murder by the Japanese army
description_wiki: The Nanjing Massacre or the Rape of Nanjing (formerly romanized as Nanking) was the mass rape and murder of Chinese civilians, noncombatants, and prisoners of war by the Imperial Japanese Army in Nanjing, the capital of the Republic of China.

aliases: Queen City of the Pacific and others
description: capital city of the Philippines
description_wiki: Manila, officially the City of Manila, is the capital and second-most populous city of the Philippines after Quezon City.

description: country in East Asia
description_wiki: China, officially the People's Republic of China (PRC), is a country in East Asia.

description: Semi-automatic rifle
description_wiki: The M1 Garand or M1 rifle is a semi-automatic rifle that was the service rifle of the U.S. Army during World War II and the Korean War.

description: 1934 unique aircraft carrier of the United States Navy
description_wiki: USS Ranger (CV-4) was an interwar United States Navy aircraft carrier, the only ship of its class.

description: marginal sea of the Atlantic Ocean
description_wiki: The North Sea lies between Great Britain, Denmark, Norway, Germany, the Netherlands, Belgium, and France.

description: seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

description: harbor on the island of Oahu, Hawaii, USA
description_wiki: Pearl Harbor is a lagoon harbor on the island of Oʻahu, Hawaii, United States, west of Honolulu.

description: archipelago in western North Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: The Mariana Islands ( MARR-ee-AH-nə; Chamorro: Manislan Mariånas), also simply the Marianas, are a crescent-shaped archipelago comprising the summits of fifteen longitudinally oriented, mostly dormant volcanic mountains in the north-western Pacific Ocean, between the 12th and 21st parallels north and along the 145th meridian east.

description: 1944 battle of the Pacific campaign of World War II on the island of Saipan in the Mariana Islands
description_wiki: The Battle of Saipan was an amphibious assault launched by the United States against the Empire of Japan during the Pacific campaign of World War II between 15 June and 9 July 1944.

description: Pacific island, part of the Northern Mariana Islands, United States
second-largest of the Hawaiian Islands, in the United States
description_wiki: Maui is the second-largest island in the Hawaiian archipelago, at 727.2 square miles (1,883 km2).

description: country near the equator in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: The Marshall Islands, officially the Republic of the Marshall Islands, is an island country in Oceania.

description: US Marine Corps base near Oceanside, California, United States
description_wiki: Marine Corps Base Camp Pendleton is the major West Coast base of the United States Marine Corps and is one of the largest Marine Corps bases in the United States.

aliases: The town of Our Lady the Queen of the Angels of the Little Portion
description: seat of Los Angeles County, and largest city in California, United States
description_wiki: Los Angeles (often referred to by its initials, LA) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of California, and the commercial, financial, and cultural center of Southern California.

description: football stadium in Pasadena, California, United States
